commit.message: chore: release v1.4.0
Force two-column layout with multiple rows
Lay out session cards in grid
Correct card click bounds
Improve quit chord and pane input handling
Add title bar to tmuxwatch UI
Fix card close button hit detection
Handle empty pane capture errors
Show pane metadata in session headers
Pulse cards on new pane output
Add interactive mouse support and tmux input
Smooth status refresh cadence
Update Go dependencies
Redesign UI with session previews and search
Add lint tooling and viewport scrolling
Initial tmuxwatch TUI with pane tabs and docs
Initial commit
